papers.title: A Negotiated-Autonomy Protocol for Agentic Systems

rubric.label: Top venue
rubric.body: Tight, top-venue prose. No boilerplate triads ('robust, scalable, and efficient' and the like); no empty intensifiers ('notably', 'importantly'); no throat-clearing ('it is worth noting that'). Every factual claim carries a citation or points at a specific section of this paper. Terminology is consistent throughout.

annotations.contextAfter: First, the principal and agent jointly specify a Trust Contract.
annotations.note: Open the Approach section with a sentence that names all three phases briefly, rather than teasing 'three phases' and listing them on the following lines.
